message:
feat(lexical): add conversation_id field to cass schema; fix: use git dep for asupersync

- Add optional conversation_id (i64) to CassFields/CassDocument for
  conversation-level provenance tracking in search results
- Switch asupersync from relative path to git dep so downstream
  `cargo install --git` consumers can resolve the dependency chain
- Bump schema hash to force reindex

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
